# netbox_ip_range (Data Source)

Fetches an IP range from NetBox by start and end addresses.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `end_address` (String) The ending IP address of the range.
- `start_address` (String) The starting IP address of the range.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the IP range.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the IP range.
- `status` (String) The status of the IP range.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with this IP range.
- `vrf` (Number) The VRF ID associated with this IP range.
